note: v1 stored an item's tree shape in per-item `.parent` (objref|null) + dense `.position` (1..N). v2 makes the room-owned ordered-edge index (`__ordered_edge` = { parent, rank }) the SOLE structural authority. This migration derives each item's edge from its legacy (parent, position) — grouping siblings by (containing outliner, parent), ordering by (position, then item id for a total/reproducible tie-break), and assigning fractional ranks in that order — then drops the legacy props so there is no second write path. Idempotent: a complete valid existing edge index is preserved byte-for-byte, including after the legacy inputs have been dropped.
